title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB941-2nD-TC, hAP-Lite
description: The home Access Point lite (hAP lite) is an ideal little device for your apartment, house or office It supports button triggered WPS, for the convenience of not typing a complicated when somebody wants to have wireless internet access, and can also be told to change to cAP mode and join a CAPsMAN centrally managed network by the push of a button Of course, the device runs RouterOS with all the features, bandwidth shaping, firewall, user access control and many others The hAP lite is equipped with a powerful 650MHz CPU, 32MB RAM, dual chain 2.4GHz onboard wireless, four Fast Ethernet ports and a RouterOS L4 license. USB power supply is included
specsSearch: Wireless features Tx power [dBm] 22 Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Antenna gain [dBi] < 2 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (4) 10/100Mbps Power Power type USB (5V) Max. power consumption [W] 3 Power via connector/terminal 5V DC Physical characteristics Design Desktop Operating temperature [°C] 20 up to 70 Width [mm] 54 Height [mm] 124 Depth [mm] 100 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 32
